# Auto-generated by PROBE Phase 10 (KernelGPT + DeepSeek)
# Linux MMC block device ioctl interface

include <uapi/asm/ioctl.h>
include <uapi/linux/mmc/ioctl.h>

resource fd_mmc[fd]

syz_open_dev$mmc(dev ptr[in, string["/dev/mmcblk#"]], id intptr, flags flags[open_flags]) fd_mmc

ioctl$mmc_IOC_CMD(fd fd_mmc, cmd const[MMC_IOC_CMD], arg ptr[in, mmc_ioc_cmd])
ioctl$mmc_IOC_MULTI_CMD(fd fd_mmc, cmd const[MMC_IOC_MULTI_CMD], arg ptr[in, mmc_ioc_multi_cmd])

mmc_ioc_cmd {
	write_flag	int32
	is_acmd	int32
	opcode	int32
	arg	int32
	response	array[int32, 4]
	flags	int32
	blksz	int32
	blocks	int32
	postsleep_min_us	int32
	postsleep_max_us	int32
	data_timeout_ns	int32
	cmd_timeout_ms	int32
	__pad	int32
	data_ptr	int64
}

mmc_ioc_multi_cmd {
	num_of_cmds	int64
	cmds	array[mmc_ioc_cmd]
}
